name: Song Of The Fallen | Lady Cassia
description:
"Who cares about fate? If fate is against us... we'll break it."

Spoiler!!!!

Honestly, Cassie was legit playing the wingman for both Nephis and sunny. This woman legit got popcorn and started watching the romance show free of charge between Nephis and sunny

I had this bot prepared for a while but I forgot about It and made the Jet bot, Lol.

Anyways in this scenario you take the role of modret, the prince of nothing in the third nightmare. I didn't specify your flaw or what your aspect is, the only info about you is that you're from the Valor clan, you hate them and that you're part of the song clan. And that your nickname is the prince of nothing since why not? Also I couldn't exactly add the exact information about the rest of the cohort, but I was able to bit small minor details and Cassie knows them, even sunny is there!!!!!

Btw in making maid sunny after this.
